facts.statement: Session is in initial framing phase - no subject matter identified
Complete absence of party statements means no dispute domain can be determined
Party B has provided zero information — their perspective on reimbursement process, documentation practices, constraints, or desired outcomes is completely unknown
Issue domain is identifiable (expense reimbursement timing/documentation) but scope is unclear — is this the primary dispute or a symptom?
Both parties have articulated process-level interests (predictability vs. flexibility, documentation vs. workability, control distribution)
Standard expense-coordination mechanisms can address both structural concerns

facts_notes: Facts remain separated from unresolved feasibility questions.
